create.desc_placeholder: Briefly describe the purpose of this agent...
create.steps_desc: Maximum number of reasoning loops before a forced completion.
create.subtitle: Configure a specialized agent for autonomous tasks and complex reasoning using local LLMs.
create.title: Create Agent
create.response_mode_desc: Default adds an LLM summary after tool execution. Direct Tool Result returns the tool output immediately and is better for tool-centric agents.
create.default_system_prompt: You are an intelligent assistant with expertise in analysis and problem-solving.
create.execution_kernel_override_desc: Agent-level override for Execution Kernel (only applies in Plan-Based mode).
create.replan_prompt_desc: Custom instructions for when replanning is triggered
create.tool_failure_reflection_desc: On each failed skill step, an extra model call may run (advisory only; no auto-fix or re-run). At most {max} reflection calls per plan run to limit cost if failures repeat. Extra inference per call. Stored in model_params.tool_failure_reflection.
create.plan_execution_desc: Stored in model_params.plan_execution. Per-step options can still override (e.g. parallel_group, timeout).
create.pe_max_parallel_desc: 0 to skip. When multiple steps share a parallel_group, cap concurrency.
create.pe_default_max_retries_desc: Retries after first failure. 0 disables auto-retry.
create.intent_rules_desc: Configure keyword-to-skill mappings for automatic intent detection.
create.use_skill_discovery_desc: When no intent rule matches, semantically search selected skills using the user input and automatically choose the most relevant skill (V2.4).
create.skill_discovery_override: Custom discovery parameters for this agent
create.skill_discovery_override_desc: Overrides global values under Settings → Runtime; when off, server defaults apply.
create.regex_desc: Use regex for pattern matching (e.g., date patterns) or keywords for simple matching
create.keywords_placeholder: Keywords (comma separated): test, weekly report, summary

nl.title: Generate draft from natural language
nl.subtitle: Describe the goal; we match skills and use your local model for name and system prompt (nothing is saved until you confirm).
nl.placeholder: e.g. An agent that reads logs, summarizes risks, and suggests fixes…
nl.err_short: Please enter at least 4 characters describing what you need.

empty_state.subtitle: Create your first autonomous agent to start delegating complex tasks to local LLMs.

execution.confirm_delete_session: Are you sure you want to delete this session? This action cannot be undone.
execution.empty_session: Send a message to start a new session.
execution.input_placeholder: How can I help you today?
execution.reflection_trace_hint: This session's trace includes tool-failure reflection suggestions. Use “View Trace” below for details.
execution.collaboration_empty: No collaboration metadata on this session yet. It is set on first run (or when invoked from a workflow). The next turns reuse the same correlation in this session.

agents.search_no_results_desc: No agents match "{query}". Try a different search term.
agents.subtitle: Manage and run local AI agents in your desktop environment.
agents.title: Agent Registry

trace.dag_description: Step dependency graph (inferred from execution order)
trace.error_reference_hint: The upstream tool or LLM failed. Check logs and API health.
trace.select_step: Select a step from the timeline.
trace.reflection_advisory_hint: Model-generated hints from the run trace. Nothing is auto-applied; verify against logs and your policies.
trace.reflection_parse_error: Could not parse structured output; see excerpt below.

debug.no_kernel_instance: No execution kernel instance available. Run the agent first.
debug.no_events: No events recorded for this execution.

agents.delete_confirm: Delete agent "{name}"? This cannot be undone.

header.auto_desc: Auto-switch to VLM for images, LLM for text
header.stream_transport_sync: Syncs with Settings → Runtime. Saved in this browser.

chat.input_footer: Enter to wrap, Ctrl/⌘ + Enter to send • OpenVitamin • Local-first Inference • Private & Secure
chat.voice_permission_denied: Microphone permission required for voice input

message.no_rag_reason1: Low semantic similarity between query and knowledge base content
message.no_rag_reason2: Few content or the topic is not covered
message.no_rag_reason3: Distance threshold is set too high
message.no_rag_result: No relevant content found in the knowledge base. Possible reasons:
message.no_trace: No Trace found or Knowledge Base was not used.

chat.new_conversation_desc: Send a message to begin your local AI inference session.

parameters.system_prompt_placeholder: You are a helpful AI assistant...
parameters.title: Parameters

vision.model_not_supported: Current model does not support images. The message will be sent as plain text.

common.no_results_hint: Try adjusting your search or filters.

create.desc_placeholder: Describe the purpose of this knowledge base...
create.subtitle: Configure local vector storage and indexing parameters for optimized Retrieval-Augmented Generation.
create.title: Create New Knowledge Base
create.vec_store_desc: SQLite-vec is the default vector store for local-first RAG.

delete_dialog.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {name}?
delete_dialog.title: Delete Knowledge Base
delete_dialog.warning: This will permanently delete all documents, chunks, and physical files. This action cannot be undone.

detail.delete_doc_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
detail.delete_doc_warning: This will also delete all associated chunks. This action cannot be undone.

messages.err_file_type: Unsupported file type: {ext}. Supported types: PDF, TXT, MD, DOCX

detail.retrieval_prompt: Enter a query and click Search to test retrieval...
detail.search_type_help: Currently only Dense (vector) search is supported. Hybrid search (vector + keyword) will be available in future updates.
detail.tip1: Adjust similarity threshold and top-k results in the right sidebar
detail.tip2: Lower threshold = more results, higher threshold = more relevant results
detail.tip3: Press Enter or click Search to test retrieval

upload_area.supported: PDF, TXT, MD, or DOCX files up to 20MB

knowledge.search_placeholder: Search knowledge bases, models or tags...
knowledge.subtitle: Index and manage local vector stores for Retrieval-Augmented Generation workflows. All data remains processed on your machine.
knowledge.title: Knowledge Bases

empty_state.title: No logs
empty_state.waiting: Logs will appear here when the system generates them.

image_generation.title: Image Generation
image_generation.subtitle: Run local text-to-image jobs with polling, history, and warmup.
image_generation.prompt_placeholder: Describe the image you want to generate
image_generation.delete_error: Failed to delete image generation job
image_generation.delete_confirm: Delete this image generation history entry?
image_generation.poll_error: Failed to poll image generation job
image_generation.submit_error: Failed to create image generation job
image_generation.cancel_error: Failed to cancel image generation job
image_generation.warmup_error: Failed to warm up image generation runtime
image_generation.models_error: Failed to load image generation models
image_generation.history_error: Failed to load image generation history

add_cloud_dialog.description_placeholder: Add a short note about this model...
add_cloud_dialog.provider_model_id_desc: The exact model identifier used by the provider's API.
add_cloud_dialog.storage_secure: Stored securely in your local database.
add_cloud_dialog.subtitle: Connect to external LLM providers via OpenAI-compatible APIs
add_cloud_dialog.title: Add Cloud Model

config.local_only: Only local models can be configured here.
config.system_prompt_placeholder: Enter system instruction or model description...

models.no_models_desc: Try scanning for assets or check your configuration.

registry.model_registry_desc: Manage model capabilities, runtimes, and deployment targets.

editor.title: Model Config
editor.capabilities_desc: Select the capabilities this model supports.

settings.unsaved_changes_desc: This page has configuration changes that are not saved yet. Save them before leaving to avoid losing edits.

backend.gpu_offload_desc: Set to 0 for CPU only. Higher values require more VRAM.
backend.model_loader_desc: Select the inference engine backend best suited for your hardware.
backend.title: Backend Configuration

offline_mode.description: Disconnects all external API calls. Inference will run strictly on local hardware.
offline_mode.title: Offline Mode

backup.auto_delete_desc: Automatically delete the oldest backups when the backup count exceeds the retention limit
backup.enable_auto_desc: Automatically backup the database periodically to protect your data
backup.restore_confirm_desc: This operation will restore the database using the selected backup. Current data will be overwritten and this operation cannot be undone.
backup.subtitle: Protect your conversations, memory and system data.
backup.title: Database Backup

model_backup.title: Model Config Backup
model_backup.subtitle: Snapshot and restore local model model.json, alongside database backup.
model_backup.section_desc: Snapshot and restore local model model.json, alongside database backup.
model_backup.delete_confirm_message: Delete this backup? This cannot be undone. Backup ID:
model_backup.restore_confirm_prompt: Enter the backup ID above to confirm:
model_backup.single_backup_desc: Select a local model to create a snapshot of its model.json. A row in the list means the backup succeeded; files are under backup_dir/model_json/snapshots/<model_id_safe>/.
model_backup.alert_confirm_restore_id: Enter the backup ID to confirm restore
model_backup.confirm_cleanup_report: Generate report only, no deletion. Continue?
model_backup.confirm_cleanup_delete: Delete snapshot files per retention policy. Continue?

runtime.title: Runtime
runtime.subtitle: Model loading and resource release policy; affects unload and cache behavior when switching models.
runtime.auto_unload_desc: When on, switching session/model will unload the current local model before loading the new one (saves VRAM, more cold starts). Off by default.
runtime.auto_release_enabled_desc: Unload least-recently-used local models when over cache limit or idle timeout.
runtime.mcp_emit_bus_readonly: MCP Streamable HTTP: whether server-push SSE summaries are published to the app event bus (read-only): {state}
runtime.effective_timing_note: After saving, the new runtime policy does not immediately force-reconcile models already loaded in memory. It takes effect gradually on subsequent requests, model switches, and future auto-release cycles.
runtime.max_cached_desc: Global fallback limit. Other local runtime types use this when no dedicated per-type limit is configured.
runtime.per_type_limits_desc: LLM, VLM, and image generation now calculate cache pressure independently instead of competing for one shared bucket.
runtime.max_cached_llm_desc: Controls how many local LLM runtimes stay resident. Keep at least 1 for normal chat usage.
runtime.max_cached_vlm_desc: Controls how many local VLM runtimes stay resident. Vision models are usually heavier, so size this to your memory budget.
runtime.max_cached_image_generation_desc: Controls how many local image-generation runtimes stay resident. Set to 2 if you frequently switch between image models.
runtime.stream_chat_local_note: These options are stored in this browser only and apply to streaming chat requests immediately; they are independent of the server Save button above.
runtime.stream_gzip_desc: Reduces SSE payload size on slow links. The browser transparently decompresses; UI behavior stays the same.
runtime.stream_format_desc: OpenAI-compatible chunks, compact JSONL, or document-oriented Markdown frames for custom clients and APIs.
runtime.skill_discovery_desc: Hybrid scoring and filters for natural-language skill search and runtime discovery. Saved values apply to the discovery API and semantic discovery unless an Agent sets model_params.skill_discovery.
runtime.skill_discovery_tag_weight_hint: 0–1. hybrid = semantic cosine×(1−w) + tag match×w. Example: 0.3 ≈ 30% tag, 70% semantic.
runtime.skill_discovery_min_semantic_hint: 0 disables the filter. At 0.7, only candidates with cosine ≥0.7 are kept.
runtime.skill_discovery_min_hybrid_hint: 0 disables. Additional floor on the combined semantic+tag score.
runtime.agent_plan_exec_desc: Applies to the Plan-based executor: max concurrency per parallel_group batch, default per-step timeout/retry when a step has no own settings. Can override .env defaults.
runtime.agent_plan_max_parallel_hint: 1–32. Capped with Agent model_params.plan_execution.max_parallel_in_group to the lower value.
runtime.agent_step_default_timeout_hint: 0: no global timeout; use .env or per agent/step.
runtime.agent_step_default_retries_hint: 0 means no automatic retries. Total attempts = 1 + retries.
runtime.smart_routing_enabled_desc: When enabled, requests are routed by model load, rollout strategy, and user priority.
runtime.smart_routing_preview_empty: No policy yet. Use the quick builder above or edit JSON directly.
runtime.smart_routing_snapshot_empty: No snapshot yet. Successful saves will create recent versions automatically.
runtime.smart_routing_supported_strategies: Supported strategies: blue_green / canary / weighted / least_loaded / least_loaded_prefer_candidate.
runtime.advanced_desc: Compatibility and fallback controls. Day-to-day tuning should usually stay with the core settings above.
runtime.idle_ttl_desc: Models idle longer than this may be released (30–86400).
runtime.min_interval_desc: Minimum time between two auto releases to reduce thrashing (1–3600).
runtime.workflow_governance_desc: Controls governance maturity levels (Healthy / Warning / Risky) and soft-gating trigger points in the Workflow editor.
runtime.workflow_governance_preview_thresholds: Current thresholds: Healthy <= {healthy}%, Warning <= {warning}%, others are Risky
runtime.review_note: This page should stay focused on the four core knobs: auto release, per-type cache limits, idle TTL, and minimum release interval. Splitting TTL or release interval by model type would add complexity without enough operational value right now.
runtime.priority_slo_panel_desc: Controls high-priority SLO alerts and preemption cooldown busy hints in the Optimization Dashboard. Changes apply immediately after saving.
runtime.priority_slo_judgement: Current evaluation: Critical < {critical}%, Warning < {warning}%, Cooldown Busy >= {cooldown} times

perception.title: Object Detection (YOLO)
perception.desc: Configure vision.detect_objects tool for Agent. Model path is under dataDirectory/perception/YOLOv8/ by default.
perception.model_path_hint: Optional. Full path to .pt file (e.g. yolov8s.pt). Empty = use default under model directory.

settings.subtitle: Manage your local inference environment, backend parameters, and data privacy controls.
settings.title: Platform Settings

image_generation.title: Image Generation
image_generation.desc: Configure the default image generation model used when tools or agents do not explicitly specify one.
image_generation.default_model_hint: Explicit model_id still takes precedence. If left on auto, the platform falls back to deterministic local-first selection.

mcp.title: MCP Servers
mcp.subtitle: Configure stdio or Streamable HTTP MCP servers, probe tools, and import as platform skills (admin API key required).
mcp.probe_hint: stdio: one argv per line. HTTP: MCP endpoint URL. Optional headers / env below.
mcp.probe_env_ph: stdio: subprocess env. HTTP: sent as request headers (e.g. Authorization=Bearer …)
mcp.name: Display name
mcp.env_ph: One KEY=value per line; # starts a comment
mcp.env_ph_http: HTTP: KEY=value becomes request headers (Authorization, etc.). stdio: subprocess env.
mcp.confirm_delete: Delete this MCP configuration? Imported skills are not removed.
mcp.err_command: Enter at least one command line.
mcp.err_url: Enter the MCP HTTP endpoint URL.
mcp.emit_server_push_events: Publish server SSE push summaries to the event bus
mcp.emit_server_push_events_hint: When enabled, JSON-RPC messages received on the Streamable HTTP GET SSE channel are published as mcp.streamable.server_rpc (summary only: method, param keys, etc.). Turn off here to reduce traffic; env MCP_HTTP_EMIT_SERVER_PUSH_EVENTS remains the process default when unset in platform settings.
mcp.emit_source_platform: Source: saved in platform settings (overrides env default).
mcp.emit_source_env: Source: environment variable / built-in default (not yet saved in platform DB).
mcp.dlq_inspect_hint: To inspect app event bus DLQ entries for MCP server-push events, admins can GET (with admin auth):

create.builtin_readonly: Built-in skills are read-only and cannot be modified.
create.define_subtitle: Configure logic, data schemas, and execution parameters for your local AI services.
create.description_placeholder: Briefly explain what this skill achieves...
create.logic_default: Complete the following task based on user input and output in the required format.
create.logic_placeholder: Enter your skill prompt. Use {{input.key}} to reference input schema.
create.retry_hint: Number of automatic retries on failure.
create.timeout_hint: Maximum time allowed for the model to generate a response.
create.title: Create Skill
create.tools_search_placeholder: Search tools by name or description…
create.variable_hint: Use double curly braces {{variable}} to map to your input schema.
create.workflow_steps_desc: Workflow steps define the sequence of tool calls. Each step includes tool_name, tool_args_mapping, and optional output_key.

skills.delete_confirm: Delete skill "{name}"? This cannot be undone.
skills.mcp_connection_desc: This skill maps to a tool exposed by a local MCP server. Saving name, description, or input schema does not change the underlying MCP binding.
skills.search_placeholder: Search skills by name, tag, or description...
skills.discovery_desc: Pick an agent to apply public / org / private visibility, then search by natural language or load usage-based recommendations.
skills.discovery_empty_filtered: No skills match this source filter. Try “All sources” or another filter.
skills.subtitle: Manage and deploy reusable engineering units for your local AI agents.
skills.title: Skills Registry

workflow_editor.node_config_select: Click a node on the canvas to configure it
workflow_editor.node_config_no_options: No extra options for this node.
workflow_editor.llm_model_placeholder: Select local or cloud LLM/VLM model
workflow_editor.llm_models_empty: No LLM/VLM models. Add or scan in Models page first
workflow_editor.agent_empty: No agents. Create one in Agents page first
workflow_editor.edge_condition_hint: Condition is evaluated at runtime. Leave empty to use trigger only.
workflow_editor.agent_fixed_input_hint: Use fixed_input as the default input when upstream does not pass prompt/message/query/text.
workflow_editor.agent_output_schema_hint: Validate Agent output against this schema at runtime; leave empty to disable validation.
workflow_editor.condition_expression_hint: Supports aliases: ${input.xxx}, ${global.input_data.xxx}, ${prev.xxx}. Use the true / false output handles to connect branches.
workflow_editor.loop_runtime_hint: Use the continue / exit output handles to connect loop branches.
workflow_editor.subworkflow_version_hint: "latest" follows the workflow’s published version; production server policy may disallow it—prefer fixed with explicit version id or semver.
workflow_editor.subworkflow_mapping_hint: Maps upstream context into the child workflow input and maps child outputs into this node’s output. Omit or use {} to pass current node input through.
workflow_editor.subworkflow_search_placeholder: Search by id, name, or tag
workflow_editor.subworkflow_self_reference: Target is the workflow you are editing; runtime may recurse—confirm this is intended.
workflow_editor.subworkflow_target_required: Please select or input target workflow ID (target_workflow_id)
workflow_editor.subworkflow_self_reference_risk: Target references the workflow currently being edited, which may cause recursive calls
workflow_editor.subworkflow_fixed_version_required: With fixed strategy, select a version or provide target_version_id / target_version
workflow_editor.input_schema_object_only: input_schema must be a valid JSON object
workflow_editor.fixed_input_object_only: fixed_input must be a valid JSON object
workflow_editor.output_key_required_with_expression: output_key is required when expression is set
workflow_editor.fixed_input_parse_error: fixed_input must be a JSON object (for example {"query":"..."})
workflow_editor.json_syntax_error: Invalid JSON syntax. Please check commas, quotes, and braces.
workflow_editor.condition_edge_trigger_error: Condition node edges must use condition_true or condition_false trigger.
workflow_editor.condition_expression_required: Condition node: condition_expression is empty; please provide an expression
workflow_editor.condition_variable_missing: Condition variable not found: ${variable}. Input does not provide this field (available: {available})
workflow_editor.condition_node_reference_missing: Condition references a non-existent node variable: ${variable}
workflow_editor.condition_query_maybe_always_false: Condition may always be false: default query is empty; check Input.fixed_input.query or runtime input_data.query
workflow_editor.condition_branch_incomplete: Condition branches are incomplete: both true and false outgoing edges are required
workflow_editor.loop_edge_trigger_error: Loop node edges must use loop_continue or loop_exit trigger.
workflow_editor.edge_trigger_scope_error: This trigger is only valid for condition/loop source nodes.
workflow_editor.agent_timeout_non_negative: Timeout must be a non-negative integer (seconds)
workflow_editor.agent_max_steps_error: Max steps must be an integer between 1 and 50
workflow_editor.output_schema_object_only: Output schema must be a JSON object
workflow_editor.output_schema_valid_json: Output schema must be valid JSON
workflow_editor.default_input_object_only: Default input must be a JSON object
workflow_editor.default_input_valid_json: Default input must be valid JSON
workflow_editor.input_schema_hint: Used only to document the expected input structure and aid editing checks. The current runtime does not enforce it.

workflow_run.correlation_hint: Runtime uses wfex_{execution_id} for Agent node handoff when not set in global_context.
workflow_run.reconcile_tooltip: Recovery for inconsistent states: write terminal status from kernel back to DB.
workflow_run.require_published: Only published versions can run. Please publish this workflow first.
workflow_run.wait_hint: Synchronous waiting may timeout. Recommended for debugging only.
workflow_run.graph_placeholder: Graph view placeholder: DAG rendering can be integrated next.
workflow_run.open_session_in_run: Open this session in Agent run
workflow_run.execution_call_chain_hint: Parent/child workflow runs under the same correlation, with per-agent collaboration summaries.
workflow_run.delivery_collab_hint: Rollup from each node’s output collaboration_messages (same source as Inspector).
workflow_run.delivery_collab_empty: No collaboration messages recorded for this run.
workflow_run.timeline_collab_legend: Ticks: collab error (rose) / retry (amber). Timestamp aligns to time; if missing, shown at bar midpoint.
workflow_run.list_row_select_header_hint: Click the header/metadata area to select; the JSON block is for copy and does not change selection.
workflow_run.collab_anomaly_badge_title: All: groups from full node messages. Filtered: groups after status/stage filters. Both count groups with error or retry vs total groups.
workflow_run.error_logs_filter_hint: Filter by selected node and optional fields. total={total}
workflow_run.error_logs_empty: No error logs in current filter.
workflow_run.failure_verify_hash_title_report: Recompute SHA-256 from the last exported JSON and compare
workflow_run.failure_verify_hash_title_bundle_mem: Parse exported zip locally and compare SHA-256 to the header from export
workflow_run.failure_verify_hash_title_bundle_api: Re-fetch failure report from API and compare SHA-256 (re-export bundle for offline verify)
workflow_run.failure_expected_sha_placeholder: Expected SHA-256 (optional — uses value above after export)
workflow_run.failure_expected_sha_input_title: Paste 64 hex chars to verify a saved zip without re-exporting
workflow_run.failure_verify_zip_button_title: Pick a workflow failure bundle .zip and compare canonical hash to expected SHA-256
workflow_run.failure_verify_missing_execution: Verify failed: missing execution id. Export the bundle again for offline verify.
workflow_run.failure_zip_needs_expected: Zip verify needs a 64-character hex SHA-256: paste above, or export report/bundle first.

workflow.title: Workflow
workflow.subtitle: Manage and deploy automated AI chains
workflow.new_pipeline_desc: Start from a template or scratch
workflow.empty_desc: Create your first workflow to get started
workflow.confirm_save_before_run: You need to save the workflow before running. Save now?
workflow.run_requires_published: Only published workflow versions can be executed. Save and publish the workflow before running it.

layer.title: Optimization Layer
layer.desc: Enable intelligent scheduling based on historical execution data
